name: Byron High School
description: Byron High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Byron, IL. There are 6 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are available. Players have access to lights.

name: Helms Park and Athletic Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Helms Park and Athletic Complex in Rochelle, IL! There are 5 asphalt and wood courts. 3 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Fee is only required for indoor drop in play

name: Nash - Oregon Park District
description: Nash - Oregon Park District is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oregon, IL. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
